_meta.note: Manual caps and subscriptions for tools that do not expose a live limit API. Edit this file to match your actual plans.

droid.notes: Factory.ai stores limits server-side; set monthly_token_cap or monthly_et_cap manually if you know your cap.

opencode.notes: OpenCode can use local or cloud models; configure caps per provider/model in OpenCode itself.

grok.notes: xAI API is pay-as-you-go; no fixed cap unless you set one in your xAI dashboard.

hermes.notes: Hermes usage is local/logged; no known live limit API.
